title: Fair-Use Cache Keys, TTL, Clock Injection, Copies, and Eviction
description: The cache keys raw commands, uses time.Now deep inside methods, returns mutable shared slices, never expires failures, and grows without a capacity policy. Learners cumulatively produce bounded TTL resource cache with observable decisions through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Canonicalize endpoint, resource identity, and representation into a typed cache key without mixing user spelling or presentation.
Inject a clock, define freshness at exact boundaries, and distinguish fetched, stored, observed, and expires times.
Choose immutable values, deep copies, or documented ownership so callers cannot mutate cached history or other results.
